name: Creme De Menthe Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the crushed chocolate wafers and melted butter. Mix well. Press into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan. Freeze while preparing the filling.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, sugar, creme de menthe, and mint extract until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust in the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely.
6. Melt the semi-sweet chocolate in a double boiler. Allow to cool for 5 minutes, then beat in the sour cream. Spread the mixture over the warm cheesecake.
7. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
20 servings. Calories=300 Fat
